<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Vishnu Priya — Social Media Strategist</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;0,900;1,400;1,700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg:#FFFBF5;
  --white:#FFFFFF;
  --ink:#1A1207;
  --muted:#7A6E62;
  --pink:#FF4D8D;
  --orange:#FF7A1A;
  --yellow:#FFD600;
  --teal:#00C9A7;
  --blue:#3B82F6;
  --violet:#8B5CF6;
  --surface:#FFF8EE;
  --border:#EDE8DF;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);overflow-x:hidden}

/* ── CUSTOM CURSOR ── */
#cursor{position:fixed;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink);pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .25s,height .25s,background .25s;mix-blend-mode:multiply}
#cursor-trail{position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--pink);pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:left .12s ease-out,top .12s ease-out,border-color .25s;opacity:0.5}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:100;padding:1.2rem 5rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,251,245,0.88);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:-0.01em}
.nav-logo span{color:var(--pink)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;align-items:center}
.nav-links a{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:0.02em;transition:color .2s;position:relative}
.nav-links a::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:-3px;left:0;width:0;height:2px;background:var(--pink);transition:width .25s;border-radius:2px}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--ink)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%}
.nav-cta{padding:0.55rem 1.4rem;background:var(--pink);color:white !important;border-radius:100px;font-weight:600 !important;transition:all .25s !important}
.nav-cta::after{display:none !important}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--ink) !important;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(255,77,141,0.3)}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{min-height:92vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:center;padding:5.5rem 5rem 3rem;gap:3.5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

/* Blob backgrounds */
.blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);pointer-events:none;z-index:0;opacity:0.45}
.blob-1{width:500px;height:500px;background:var(--yellow);top:-100px;right:-100px;animation:blobFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite}
.blob-2{width:350px;height:350px;background:var(--pink);bottom:-50px;left:-80px;animation:blobFloat 10s ease-in-out 2s infinite}
.blob-3{width:250px;height:250px;background:var(--teal);top:40%;right:45%;animation:blobFloat 7s ease-in-out 1s infinite}
@keyframes blobFloat{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}33%{transform:translate(20px,-20px) scale(1.05)}66%{transform:translate(-15px,15px) scale(0.97)}}

.hero>*{position:relative;z-index:1}

.hero-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;background:rgba(255,77,141,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,77,141,0.25);border-radius:100px;padding:0.4rem 1rem 0.4rem 0.5rem;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--pink);margin-bottom:1rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .6s .2s forwards}
.hero-pill-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.5;transform:scale(1.3)}}

.hero-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(3.8rem,6vw,6.2rem);font-weight:900;line-height:.96;letter-spacing:-0.03em;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s .4s forwards}
.hero-name .accent{font-style:italic;color:var(--pink);display:block}

.hero-tagline{font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.78;max-width:430px;margin-top:1.2rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s .6s forwards}

/* STAT CHIPS ROW */
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-top:1.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s .8s forwards}
.stat-chip{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:0.8rem 1.2rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06);transition:all .25s}
.stat-chip:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.stat-chip:nth-child(1){border-top:3px solid var(--pink)}
.stat-chip:nth-child(2){border-top:3px solid var(--orange)}
.stat-chip:nth-child(3){border-top:3px solid var(--teal)}
.stat-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1;color:var(--ink)}
.stat-label{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:.2rem}

.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:.9rem;margin-top:1.5rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .7s 1s forwards}
.btn-fill{padding:.85rem 2rem;background:var(--pink);color:white;text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:100px;transition:all .25s;letter-spacing:.01em}
.btn-fill:hover{background:var(--ink);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(255,77,141,.35)}
.btn-ghost{padding:.85rem 2rem;border:2px solid var(--border);color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600;border-radius:100px;transition:all .25s}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--pink);color:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-3px)}

/* HERO PHOTO */
.hero-photo-wrap{position:relative;z-index:1;opacity:0;animation:fadeIn 1s .5s forwards}
.photo-frame{position:relative;max-width:420px;margin:0 auto}
.photo-bg-shape{position:absolute;inset:-16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--yellow) 0%,var(--pink) 50%,var(--violet) 100%);border-radius:40px;z-index:0;opacity:.7}
.photo-img{width:100%;display:block;position:relative;z-index:1;border-radius:32px;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(1.05)}
.photo-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-1.2rem;right:-1.2rem;z-index:2;background:var(--white);border:3px solid var(--yellow);border-radius:20px;padding:1rem 1.4rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}
.badge-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--ink);line-height:1;display:block}
.badge-label{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.2rem}

/* FLOATING METRIC CARDS */
.float-metric{position:absolute;background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:.8rem 1.1rem;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12);z-index:3;white-space:nowrap}
.float-metric .fm-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink)}
.float-metric .fm-label{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.fm1{top:8%;left:-10%;animation:floatA 4s ease-in-out infinite;border-top:3px solid var(--teal)}
.fm2{bottom:12%;right:-12%;animation:floatB 4.5s ease-in-out infinite;border-top:3px solid var(--orange)}
.fm3{top:48%;left:-14%;animation:floatA 5s ease-in-out .5s infinite;border-top:3px solid var(--pink)}
@keyframes floatA{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}
@keyframes floatB{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px)}}

/* ── TICKER ── */
.ticker-wrap{background:var(--ink);overflow:hidden;padding:.8rem 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;position:relative;z-index:2}
.ticker-label{padding:0 2rem;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--yellow);letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.ticker-scroll{overflow:hidden;flex:1}
.ticker-inner{display:flex;animation:ticker 28s linear infinite;width:max-content;gap:0}
.ticker-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;padding:0 2.5rem;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.ticker-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--yellow)}
.ticker-txt{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase}
@keyframes ticker{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ── SECTIONS ── */
section{padding:4.5rem 5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.sec-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--pink);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.sec-tag::before{content:"";display:inline-block;width:24px;height:3px;background:var(--pink);border-radius:2px}
.sec-heading{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,3.8vw,3.2rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--ink)}
.sec-heading em{font-style:italic;color:var(--pink)}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
#about{background:var(--white)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.3fr 1fr;gap:3.5rem;align-items:start;margin-top:2.2rem}
.about-text p{font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.9;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.2rem;font-weight:400}
.skills-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem;margin-top:1.2rem}
.skill{padding:.38rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.02em;transition:all .2s;cursor:default}
.skill:nth-child(3n+1){background:#FFF0F6;color:var(--pink);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,77,141,.25)}
.skill:nth-child(3n+2){background:#FFF5E8;color:var(--orange);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,122,26,.25)}
.skill:nth-child(3n){background:#E8FFF9;color:var(--teal);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,201,167,.25)}
.skill:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.about-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem}
.about-card{background:var(--surface);border-radius:20px;padding:1.3rem;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.about-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;border-radius:20px 20px 0 0}
.about-card:nth-child(1)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink),var(--orange))}
.about-card:nth-child(2)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--blue))}
.about-card:nth-child(3)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--violet),var(--pink))}
.about-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.about-card-label{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.about-card-val{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink)}
.about-card-sub{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.3rem}

/* ── THIT SPOTLIGHT ── */
#thit{background:var(--ink);color:var(--white);overflow:hidden;position:relative;padding:4.5rem 5rem}
.thit-blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(100px);pointer-events:none;opacity:.25}
.thit-blob-1{width:500px;height:500px;background:var(--pink);top:-150px;right:-100px}
.thit-blob-2{width:400px;height:400px;background:var(--orange);bottom:-100px;left:-100px}
.thit-top{text-align:center;margin-bottom:2.5rem;position:relative;z-index:1}
.thit-award{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;background:rgba(255,214,0,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,214,0,.4);border-radius:100px;padding:.45rem 1.2rem;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--yellow);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.thit-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,4.5rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.03em}
.thit-title span{font-style:italic;color:var(--yellow)}
.thit-sub{font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);max-width:560px;margin:1rem auto 0;line-height:1.8}

.thit-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.3fr;gap:2.8rem;align-items:start;position:relative;z-index:1}
.thit-story p{font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);line-height:1.88;margin-bottom:1.1rem}
.thit-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
.thit-tag{padding:.3rem .85rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)}

/* PROGRESS BARS */
.progress-section{margin-top:1.2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:1.8rem}
.progress-title{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:1.4rem}
.progress-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.progress-label{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);min-width:90px}
.progress-track{flex:1;height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:100px;overflow:hidden}
.progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:100px;width:0;transition:width 1.8s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.pf-pink{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink),var(--orange))}
.pf-teal{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--blue))}
.pf-yellow{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--yellow),var(--orange))}
.progress-val{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);min-width:55px;text-align:right}

/* METRIC GRID */
.metric-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px}
.metric-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:20px;padding:1.2rem 1.1rem;transition:all .3s;cursor:default;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.metric-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;border-radius:20px 20px 0 0;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.metric-card:nth-child(odd)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink),var(--orange))}
.metric-card:nth-child(even)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--blue))}
.metric-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.metric-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
.metric-icon{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);margin-bottom:.7rem}
.metric-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.metric-label{font-size:.64rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45)}
.metric-sub{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(255,214,0,.7);margin-top:.3rem}

/* ── PROJECTS ── */
#projects{background:var(--bg)}
.proj-header{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;align-items:end;margin-bottom:2rem}
.proj-header p{font-size:.98rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.78}
.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.project-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:1.6rem;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .35s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer}
.project-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:5px;border-radius:24px 24px 0 0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--c1,var(--pink)),var(--c2,var(--orange)))}
.project-card:nth-child(3n+1){--c1:var(--pink);--c2:var(--orange)}
.project-card:nth-child(3n+2){--c1:var(--teal);--c2:var(--blue)}
.project-card:nth-child(3n){--c1:var(--violet);--c2:var(--pink)}
.project-card:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.proj-num-bg{position:absolute;top:.8rem;right:1.2rem;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:3.5rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(0,0,0,.04);line-height:1}
.proj-brand{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.proj-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:.9rem;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.proj-desc{font-size:.86rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.proj-metrics{display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.9rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.pm-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);line-height:1}
.pm-label{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.2rem}
.proj-divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin-bottom:1rem}
.proj-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem}
.proj-tag{padding:.22rem .65rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--surface);color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border)}

/* ── REPORTS ── */
#reports{background:var(--surface)}
.reports-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2rem;margin-top:2rem}
.report-main{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:2rem;grid-row:span 2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s}
.report-main::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:5px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pink),var(--orange),var(--yellow))}
.report-main:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.report-small{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:2rem;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.report-small::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--blue));opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.report-small:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.report-small:hover::after{opacity:1}
.rep-source{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pink);margin-bottom:.6rem}
.rep-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:.8rem;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.report-small .rep-title{font-size:1rem}
.rep-desc{font-size:.86rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.68}
.rep-stats{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;margin-top:1.2rem}
.rep-stat-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:1rem;padding:.85rem 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.rep-stat-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--pink);line-height:1;min-width:90px}
.rep-stat-label{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)}

/* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
#testimonials{background:var(--white)}
.testi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.2rem;margin-top:2rem}
.testi-card{border-radius:24px;padding:1.8rem;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .35s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.testi-card:nth-child(1){background:#FFF0F6}
.testi-card:nth-child(2){background:#F0FFF9}
.testi-card:nth-child(3){background:#FFF5E8}
.testi-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.testi-mark{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:4.5rem;font-weight:900;line-height:.7;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.testi-card:nth-child(1) .testi-mark{color:rgba(255,77,141,.25)}
.testi-card:nth-child(2) .testi-mark{color:rgba(0,201,167,.25)}
.testi-card:nth-child(3) .testi-mark{color:rgba(255,122,26,.25)}
.testi-text{font-size:.96rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.82;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.testi-author{font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--ink)}
.testi-role{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.2rem}

/* ── INSIGHTS ── */
#insights{background:var(--bg)}
.insights-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;margin-top:2rem}
.insight-main{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFF0F6 0%,#FFF5E8 100%);border-radius:24px;padding:2rem;border:1px solid rgba(255,77,141,.15);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.insight-main::before{content:"C";font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(255,77,141,.06);position:absolute;top:-4rem;right:-1rem;line-height:1;pointer-events:none}
.ins-tag{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pink);margin-bottom:.9rem}
.ins-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:1.1rem;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.ins-body{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.85}
.insight-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem}
.insight-item{background:var(--white);border-radius:16px;padding:1.5rem 1.8rem;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .25s;cursor:pointer}
.insight-item:hover{border-color:var(--pink);transform:translateX(6px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(255,77,141,.1)}
.ins-item-tag{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.ins-item-title{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;line-height:1.45}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FF4D8D 0%,#FF7A1A 50%,#FFD600 100%);text-align:center;padding:5rem 5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
#contact::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cg fill='%23ffffff' fill-opacity='0.05'%3E%3Ccircle cx='7' cy='7' r='3'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='37' cy='37' r='3'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none}
.contact-inner{position:relative;z-index:1}
.contact-heading{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,4rem);font-weight:900;color:white;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.contact-heading em{font-style:italic;display:block}
.contact-sub{font-size:1.05rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);line-height:1.82;max-width:450px;margin:0 auto 1.8rem}
.contact-actions{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.contact-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;padding:1rem 2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);color:white;text-decoration:none;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:100px;transition:all .3s;letter-spacing:.02em}
.contact-btn:hover{background:white;color:var(--pink);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{background:var(--ink);text-align:center;padding:2rem 5rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
footer p{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);letter-spacing:.06em}
footer a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}
footer a:hover{color:var(--yellow)}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.fade-in{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease}
.fade-in.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.fd1{transition-delay:.12s}
.fd2{transition-delay:.24s}

/* RESPONSIVE */
/* ── TABLET ── */
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .projects-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .metric-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .reports-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .report-main{grid-row:span 1}
  .thit-body{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .insights-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.5rem}
  .proj-header{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}

/* ── MOBILE ── */
@media(max-width:768px){
  /* NAV */
  nav{padding:.9rem 1.2rem}
  .nav-links{display:none}
  .nav-logo{font-size:1.2rem}

  /* HAMBURGER */
  .nav-hamburger{display:flex !important;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;z-index:200}
  .nav-hamburger span{display:block;width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--ink);border-radius:2px;transition:all .3s}
  .nav-hamburger.open span:nth-child(1){transform:rotate(45deg) translate(5px,5px)}
  .nav-hamburger.open span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}
  .nav-hamburger.open span:nth-child(3){transform:rotate(-45deg) translate(5px,-5px)}

  /* MOBILE MENU OVERLAY */
  .mobile-menu{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(255,251,245,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);z-index:150;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:2rem}
  .mobile-menu.open{display:flex}
  .mobile-menu a{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;transition:color .2s}
  .mobile-menu a:hover{color:var(--pink)}
  .mobile-menu .nav-cta{background:var(--pink);color:white !important;padding:.7rem 2rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:1rem !important;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif !important;font-weight:700 !important}

  /* HERO */
  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:5rem 1.2rem 2.5rem;gap:2rem;min-height:auto}
  .hero>div:first-child{order:2}
  .hero-photo-wrap{order:1;max-width:280px;margin:0 auto}
  .hero-name{font-size:3rem}
  .hero-tagline{font-size:.95rem}
  .hero-stats{gap:.7rem}
  .stat-chip{padding:.65rem .9rem}
  .stat-num{font-size:1.4rem}
  .blob-1,.blob-2,.blob-3{filter:blur(60px);opacity:.35}
  .fm1,.fm2,.fm3{display:none}
  .photo-badge{bottom:-.8rem;right:-.8rem;padding:.7rem 1rem}
  .badge-num{font-size:1.4rem}

  /* TICKER */
  .ticker-label{padding:0 1rem;font-size:.6rem}
  .ticker-item{padding:0 1.2rem}

  /* SECTIONS */
  section{padding:3rem 1.2rem}
  #thit{padding:3rem 1.2rem}
  .sec-heading{font-size:1.8rem}

  /* ABOUT */
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2rem}
  .about-text p{font-size:.95rem}
  .about-cards{gap:.8rem}

  /* THIT */
  .thit-top{margin-bottom:2rem}
  .thit-title{font-size:2rem}
  .thit-body{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2rem}
  .metric-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:8px}
  .metric-num{font-size:1.5rem}
  .progress-label{min-width:70px;font-size:.58rem}

  /* PROJECTS */
  .proj-header{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
  .projects-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem}
  .project-card{padding:1.4rem}

  /* REPORTS */
  .reports-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem}
  .report-main{padding:1.5rem}
  .rep-stat-num{font-size:1.5rem}

  /* TESTIMONIALS */
  .testi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem}
  .testi-card{padding:1.5rem}
  .testi-mark{font-size:3rem}

  /* INSIGHTS */
  .insights-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem}
  .insight-main{padding:1.5rem}
  .ins-title{font-size:1.3rem}
  .insight-list{gap:.7rem}
  .insight-item{padding:1.1rem 1.3rem}

  /* CONTACT */
  #contact{padding:3.5rem 1.2rem}
  .contact-heading{font-size:2rem}
  .contact-actions{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.8rem}
  .contact-btn{width:100%;max-width:280px;justify-content:center}

  /* FOOTER */
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;text-align:center;padding:1.5rem 1.2rem}
}

/* ── SMALL PHONES ── */
@media(max-width:400px){
  .hero-name{font-size:2.5rem}
  .metric-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .hero-stats{flex-wrap:wrap}
  .stat-chip{flex:1;min-width:80px}
  nav{padding:.8rem 1rem}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-trail"></div>

<nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#">Vishnu<span>Priya</span></a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#thit">THIT ★</a>
    <a href="#projects">Work</a>
    <a href="#reports">Reports</a>
    <a href="#testimonials">Clients</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get in Touch</a>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-hamburger" id="hamburger" style="display:none">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- MOBILE MENU -->
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">About</a>
  <a href="#thit" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">THIT ★</a>
  <a href="#projects" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Work</a>
  <a href="#reports" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Reports</a>
  <a href="#testimonials" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Clients</a>
  <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Get in Touch</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="blob blob-1"></div>
  <div class="blob blob-2"></div>
  <div class="blob blob-3"></div>
  <div>
    <div class="hero-pill"><span class="hero-pill-dot"></span>Available for new projects</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Vishnu<span class="accent">Priya</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Social media strategist crafting data-driven campaigns that grow communities, build brands, and deliver results — across 10+ brands, 1.27M+ accounts reached.</p>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat-chip"><div class="stat-num">10+</div><div class="stat-label">Brands</div></div>
      <div class="stat-chip"><div class="stat-num">1.27M+</div><div class="stat-label">Reached</div></div>
      <div class="stat-chip"><div class="stat-num">46%</div><div class="stat-label">Peak Eng.</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a class="btn-fill" href="#projects">View My Work</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#contact">Say Hello →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <div class="float-metric fm1"><div class="fm-num">1.27M+</div><div class="fm-label">Accounts Reached</div></div>
      <div class="float-metric fm2"><div class="fm-num">14.9%</div><div class="fm-label">LinkedIn Eng. Rate</div></div>
      <div class="float-metric fm3"><div class="fm-num">219K</div><div class="fm-label">Views · IHD</div></div>
      <div class="photo-bg-shape"></div>
      <img class="photo-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vishnu Priya" />
      <div class="photo-badge"><span class="badge-num">5★</span><div class="badge-label">Client Rated</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker-wrap">
  <div class="ticker-label">Live Stats</div>
  <div class="ticker-scroll">
    <div class="ticker-inner">
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">1.27M+</span><span class="ticker-txt">Accounts Reached · THIT2026</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">219K</span><span class="ticker-txt">Views in 30 Days · IHD</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">46.1%</span><span class="ticker-txt">Engagement Rate · LinkedIn</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">14.9%</span><span class="ticker-txt">Avg Eng. · THIT2026</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">62,661</span><span class="ticker-txt">Organic Impressions</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">4×</span><span class="ticker-txt">Follower Growth · THIT IG</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">100%</span><span class="ticker-txt">Organic · Zero Paid</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">1.27M+</span><span class="ticker-txt">Accounts Reached · THIT2026</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">219K</span><span class="ticker-txt">Views in 30 Days · IHD</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">46.1%</span><span class="ticker-txt">Engagement Rate · LinkedIn</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">14.9%</span><span class="ticker-txt">Avg Eng. · THIT2026</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">62,661</span><span class="ticker-txt">Organic Impressions</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">4×</span><span class="ticker-txt">Follower Growth · THIT IG</span></div>
      <div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-num">100%</span><span class="ticker-txt">Organic · Zero Paid</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <p class="sec-tag fade-in">About</p>
  <h2 class="sec-heading fade-in">Strategy meets <em>storytelling</em></h2>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text fade-in">
      <p>I'm a social media manager and content strategist who believes every brand has a story worth telling — and the right data to tell it better. My work spans healthcare institutions, lifestyle brands, real estate, HealthTech events, and C-suite personal brands.</p>
      <p>From zero-to-1.27M accounts reached in a single campaign, to building national thought leadership strategies for VLCC's founder — I design social strategies built to perform, and I track every metric that proves it.</p>
      <p>My reports aren't just charts. My content calendars aren't just schedules — they're strategic narratives played out day by day, post by post.</p>
      <div class="skills-wrap">
        <span class="skill">Instagram Strategy</span>
        <span class="skill">LinkedIn Growth</span>
        <span class="skill">Content Calendars</span>
        <span class="skill">Campaign Planning</span>
        <span class="skill">Analytics &amp; Reporting</span>
        <span class="skill">Reels &amp; Short Video</span>
        <span class="skill">Influencer Outreach</span>
        <span class="skill">Brand Audits</span>
        <span class="skill">Personal Branding</span>
        <span class="skill">PR Strategy</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-cards fade-in fd1">
      <div class="about-card"><div class="about-card-label">Industries</div><div class="about-card-val">Healthcare · Lifestyle</div><div class="about-card-sub">Real Estate · HealthTech · NGO · Personal Brand</div></div>
      <div class="about-card"><div class="about-card-label">Platforms</div><div class="about-card-val">Instagram · LinkedIn</div><div class="about-card-sub">YouTube · Pinterest · X / Twitter</div></div>
      <div class="about-card"><div class="about-card-label">Based In</div><div class="about-card-val">Delhi, India</div><div class="about-card-sub">Available for remote &amp; in-person projects</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- THIT SPOTLIGHT -->
<section id="thit">
  <div class="thit-blob thit-blob-1"></div>
  <div class="thit-blob thit-blob-2"></div>
  <div class="thit-top fade-in">
    <div class="thit-award">🏆 Campaign of the Season</div>
    <h2 class="thit-title">THIT &amp; THNX 2026 —<br><span>1.27M Reached.</span><br>Zero Spent.</h2>
    <p class="thit-sub">A 6-month social media campaign that turned a newly launched HealthTech event brand into a credible global presence — entirely through organic content strategy.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="thit-body">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <p>THIT2026 launched in August 2025 with minimal presence and no paid budget. Over six months across Instagram, LinkedIn, and X, the campaign built from scratch — authority content, shareable creatives, strategic timing, and a consistent narrative.</p>
      <p>Instagram grew 4× from 159 to 632 followers. LinkedIn grew from 1,358 to 1,956. The January breakout month drove 29,000 LinkedIn impressions. A sustained 14.9% engagement rate across 185 posts — more than 10× the event industry average — held through the entire campaign.</p>
      <div class="thit-tags">
        <span class="thit-tag">Instagram</span><span class="thit-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="thit-tag">X / Twitter</span>
        <span class="thit-tag">HealthTech</span><span class="thit-tag">Event Marketing</span><span class="thit-tag">100% Organic</span>
      </div>
      <div class="progress-section">
        <div class="progress-title">Campaign Performance</div>
        <div class="progress-row"><span class="progress-label">IG Reach</span><div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill pf-pink" data-width="96%"></div></div><span class="progress-val">1.27M+</span></div>
        <div class="progress-row"><span class="progress-label">LI Eng. Rate</span><div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill pf-yellow" data-width="100%"></div></div><span class="progress-val">14.9%</span></div>
        <div class="progress-row"><span class="progress-label">LI Impressions</span><div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill pf-teal" data-width="82%"></div></div><span class="progress-val">62,661</span></div>
        <div class="progress-row"><span class="progress-label">IG Growth</span><div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill pf-pink" data-width="79%"></div></div><span class="progress-val">4×</span></div>
        <div class="progress-row"><span class="progress-label">Total Posts</span><div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill pf-teal" data-width="62%"></div></div><span class="progress-val">185+</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-grid fade-in fd1">
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">IG Reach</div><div class="metric-num">1.27M+</div><div class="metric-label">Accounts Reached</div><div class="metric-sub">90-day window</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">LI Impressions</div><div class="metric-num">62,661</div><div class="metric-label">Organic Impressions</div><div class="metric-sub">Zero paid</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">LI Eng. Rate</div><div class="metric-num">14.9%</div><div class="metric-label">Avg Engagement</div><div class="metric-sub">10× industry avg</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">Top Reel</div><div class="metric-num">15,419</div><div class="metric-label">Views</div><div class="metric-sub">643 interactions</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">Top LI Post</div><div class="metric-num">9,397</div><div class="metric-label">Post Reach</div><div class="metric-sub">157 likes · 4.7% CTR</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">IG Followers</div><div class="metric-num">4×</div><div class="metric-label">Follower Growth</div><div class="metric-sub">159 → 632</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">Jan Spike</div><div class="metric-num">29K</div><div class="metric-label">LI Impressions</div><div class="metric-sub">Breakout month</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-icon">Reels Share</div><div class="metric-num">69.4%</div><div class="metric-label">Of All Interactions</div><div class="metric-sub">Reels dominant</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="proj-header">
    <div><p class="sec-tag fade-in">Selected Work</p><h2 class="sec-heading fade-in">Campaigns that <em>performed</em></h2></div>
    <p class="fade-in">Ten brands. Ten different challenges. One consistent outcome: results you can measure.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card fade-in"><div class="proj-num-bg">01</div><div class="proj-brand">IDF · May 2025</div><h3 class="proj-title">Igniting Dreams Foundation — Monthly Instagram</h3><p class="proj-desc">Full monthly Instagram strategy — content planning, publishing, analytics. 100% organic. Reels drove 61.4% of all views.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">12,242</div><div class="pm-label">Views</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">3,329</div><div class="pm-label">Reached</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">45%</div><div class="pm-label">Non-follower</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Instagram</span><span class="proj-tag">NGO</span><span class="proj-tag">Reels</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in fd1"><div class="proj-num-bg">02</div><div class="proj-brand">IHD · Nov–Dec 2025</div><h3 class="proj-title">International Health Dialogue — Zero to 213K</h3><p class="proj-desc">Built IHD's social presence from scratch. Top LinkedIn post: 46.1% engagement rate and 35.5% CTR. 219K views in one month.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">219K+</div><div class="pm-label">Views</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">46.1%</div><div class="pm-label">Eng. Rate</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">50,224</div><div class="pm-label">Reached</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Instagram</span><span class="proj-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="proj-tag">Launch</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in fd2"><div class="proj-num-bg">03</div><div class="proj-brand">Kailash Hospital · NCR</div><h3 class="proj-title">LinkedIn Audit &amp; 10-Pillar Strategy</h3><p class="proj-desc">Full social audit benchmarked against Apollo, Max &amp; Fortis. Delivered 10 content pillars and a premium visual identity system.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">10</div><div class="pm-label">Pillars Built</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">30+</div><div class="pm-label">Specialties</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Audit</span><span class="proj-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="proj-tag">Healthcare</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in"><div class="proj-num-bg">04</div><div class="proj-brand">OTT Influence · May 2025</div><h3 class="proj-title">OTT — 6× LinkedIn Jump in One Month</h3><p class="proj-desc">Cross-platform management — Instagram grew 240 followers, LinkedIn impressions jumped 6× from 75 to 463 in a single month.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">6,090</div><div class="pm-label">Peak Views</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">6×</div><div class="pm-label">LI Impressions</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Instagram</span><span class="proj-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="proj-tag">OTT</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in fd1"><div class="proj-num-bg">05</div><div class="proj-brand">Uptown At Advant · Noida</div><h3 class="proj-title">Luxury Retail — January Content Calendar</h3><p class="proj-desc">Full January social calendar for a premium Noida complex — The Punjab Club, McDonald's, Rookies, Looks Salon and more.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">5+</div><div class="pm-label">Verticals</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">31</div><div class="pm-label">Days Planned</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Calendar</span><span class="proj-tag">Real Estate</span><span class="proj-tag">Luxury</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in fd2"><div class="proj-num-bg">06</div><div class="proj-brand">Yamaha Music India</div><h3 class="proj-title">Echoes of Yamaha — Campaign Proposal</h3><p class="proj-desc">Pitched a branded podcast, Yashraj Mukhate live demo reels, Fusion Vibes events, and a Pinterest-linked story engagement strategy.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">4</div><div class="pm-label">Formats</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">360°</div><div class="pm-label">Campaign</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Podcast</span><span class="proj-tag">Influencer</span><span class="proj-tag">Music</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in"><div class="proj-num-bg">07</div><div class="proj-brand">THIT2026 · 6 Months ★</div><h3 class="proj-title">THIT — 1.27M Accounts Reached</h3><p class="proj-desc">Full strategy across Instagram, LinkedIn and X from Aug 2025 to Feb 2026. 4× IG growth. 14.9% avg LinkedIn engagement. 100% organic.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">1.27M+</div><div class="pm-label">IG Reached</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">14.9%</div><div class="pm-label">LI Eng.</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Instagram</span><span class="proj-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="proj-tag">HealthTech</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in fd1"><div class="proj-num-bg">08</div><div class="proj-brand">BL Bajaj · Dynamic Orbits</div><h3 class="proj-title">Personal Brand Strategy for a CXO</h3><p class="proj-desc">4-pillar personal branding strategy — full repurpose engine from YouTube to LinkedIn to Instagram to newsletter.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">4</div><div class="pm-label">Pillars</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">2,702</div><div class="pm-label">Top Impressions</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Personal Brand</span><span class="proj-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="proj-tag">CXO</span></div></div>
    <div class="project-card fade-in fd2"><div class="proj-num-bg">09</div><div class="proj-brand">Mrs. Vandana Luthra · VLCC</div><h3 class="proj-title">Integrated 2026 Strategy — Founder to Thought Leader</h3><p class="proj-desc">Full personal brand and PR strategy for VLCC's founder — LinkedIn calendar, Instagram community, podcast formats, PR roadmap.</p><div class="proj-metrics"><div><div class="pm-num">4</div><div class="pm-label">Pillars</div></div><div><div class="pm-num">6+</div><div class="pm-label">PR Channels</div></div></div><div class="proj-divider"></div><div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">PR Strategy</span><span class="proj-tag">VLCC</span><span class="proj-tag">Wellness</span></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REPORTS -->
<section id="reports">
  <p class="sec-tag fade-in">Analytics</p>
  <h2 class="sec-heading fade-in">Numbers that tell the <em>truth</em></h2>
  <div class="reports-grid">
    <div class="report-main fade-in">
      <div>
        <div class="rep-source">IHD Instagram · Nov–Dec 2025</div>
        <h3 class="rep-title">213K Views in 30 Days — From Zero Followers</h3>
        <p class="rep-desc">IHD launched on Instagram with 0 followers and 0 paid budget. Through authority-first content on global healthcare, the account reached 50,224 accounts and achieved 219,528 total views in a single month. Topic authority beats follower count every time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="rep-stats">
        <div class="rep-stat-row"><div class="rep-stat-num">219K</div><div class="rep-stat-label">Total views from account launch</div></div>
        <div class="rep-stat-row"><div class="rep-stat-num">50,224</div><div class="rep-stat-label">Unique accounts reached organically</div></div>
        <div class="rep-stat-row"><div class="rep-stat-num">46.1%</div><div class="rep-stat-label">LinkedIn engagement rate on top post</div></div>
        <div class="rep-stat-row"><div class="rep-stat-num">30,423</div><div class="rep-stat-label">Views on single carousel post</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="report-small fade-in">
      <div class="rep-source">THIT2026 · LinkedIn · 6 Months</div>
      <h3 class="rep-title">14.9% Avg Engagement — 10× Industry Standard</h3>
      <p class="rep-desc">62,661 organic impressions. LinkedIn grew from 1,358 to 1,956 followers. January breakout month: 29K impressions. Consistent 14.9% engagement. Zero paid spend throughout the entire 6-month campaign.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="report-small fade-in fd1">
      <div class="rep-source">OTT Influence · LinkedIn · May 2025</div>
      <h3 class="rep-title">6× LinkedIn Impression Growth in One Month</h3>
      <p class="rep-desc">LinkedIn impressions grew from 75 to 463 month-on-month. Engagement rate held at 11.9%. Instagram gained 240 new followers. Reels drove 67.4% of all Instagram interactions.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section id="testimonials">
  <p class="sec-tag fade-in">Kind Words</p>
  <h2 class="sec-heading fade-in">What clients <em>say</em></h2>
  <div class="testi-grid">
    <div class="testi-card fade-in"><div class="testi-mark">"</div><p class="testi-text">Vishnu Priya's monthly reports completely changed how we think about our social media. She doesn't just show you numbers — she tells you what they mean and what to do next.</p><p class="testi-author">Marketing Lead</p><p class="testi-role">IDF — Igniting Dreams Foundation</p></div>
    <div class="testi-card fade-in fd1"><div class="testi-mark">"</div><p class="testi-text">We launched IHD from absolute zero — within 30 days we had over 200,000 views on Instagram and strong LinkedIn traction from the global healthcare community. Results beyond expectations.</p><p class="testi-author">Communications Team</p><p class="testi-role">International Health Dialogue</p></div>
    <div class="testi-card fade-in fd2"><div class="testi-mark">"</div><p class="testi-text">The Yamaha proposal was genuinely exciting — the podcast concept, the Yashraj Mukhate collab ideas. She understood our brand deeply and brought fresh thinking we hadn't considered.</p><p class="testi-author">Brand Manager</p><p class="testi-role">Yamaha Music India</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- INSIGHTS -->
<section id="insights">
  <p class="sec-tag fade-in">Marketing Insights</p>
  <h2 class="sec-heading fade-in">Thoughts on <em>social</em></h2>
  <div class="insights-grid">
    <div class="insight-main fade-in">
      <div class="ins-tag">Case Study · THIT2026</div>
      <h3 class="ins-title">What 1.27M Reached From a Small Account Taught Me</h3>
      <p class="ins-body">When THIT2026 launched, the obvious move was broad content to chase followers. Instead we went deep on niche authority — global health policy, patient safety, HealthTech leadership. The result: 1.27M accounts reached in 90 days. 14.9% LinkedIn engagement sustained over 6 months. All organic. Audiences don't follow accounts — they follow subjects they trust. Build that authority first.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="insight-list">
      <div class="insight-item fade-in"><div class="ins-item-tag">Reels</div><div class="ins-item-title">Why Reels Drive 69% of Interactions — And How to Nail the First 3 Seconds</div></div>
      <div class="insight-item fade-in fd1"><div class="ins-item-tag">LinkedIn</div><div class="ins-item-title">How Healthcare Brands Hit 40%+ Engagement Rates Organically</div></div>
      <div class="insight-item fade-in fd2"><div class="ins-item-tag">Personal Brand</div><div class="ins-item-title">From Founder to National Thought Leader: The VLCC Playbook</div></div>
      <div class="insight-item fade-in"><div class="ins-item-tag">Campaign Design</div><div class="ins-item-title">Podcast as Brand Tool: What the Yamaha Concept Teaches</div></div>
      <div class="insight-item fade-in fd1"><div class="ins-item-tag">Zero Budget</div><div class="ins-item-title">213K Views, No Spend: The IHD Authority Content Playbook</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <h2 class="contact-heading">Ready to grow<em>your brand?</em></h2>
    <p class="contact-sub">Whether you need a full social strategy, ongoing management, a brand audit, or a campaign — let's build something great together.</p>
    <div class="contact-actions">
      <a class="contact-btn" href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#d5a5b8b4b9a0a5a7b4beb4a6bde095b2b8b4bcb9fbb6bab8">✉ Email Me</a>
      <a class="contact-btn" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/vishnu-priyaa-498057206/" target="_blank">in LinkedIn</a>
      <a class="contact-btn" href="https://www.instagram.com/its.vp.yaar/" target="_blank">◎ Instagram</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>© 2025 Vishnu Priya · Social Media Strategist · Delhi, India</p>
  <p><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="23534e424f565351424842504b1663444e424a4f0d404c4e">[email&#160;protected]</a> · <a href="https://www.instagram.com/its.vp.yaar/" target="_blank">@its.vp.yaar</a></p>
</footer>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
// CUSTOM CURSOR
const cur = document.getElementById('cursor');
const trail = document.getElementById('cursor-trail');
let mx=0,my=0,tx=0,ty=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY;
  cur.style.left = mx+'px'; cur.style.top = my+'px';
});
(function animTrail(){
  tx += (mx-tx)*0.12; ty += (my-ty)*0.12;
  trail.style.left = tx+'px'; trail.style.top = ty+'px';
  requestAnimationFrame(animTrail);
})();

const hoverEls = document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.project-card,.testi-card,.insight-item,.about-card,.metric-card');
const colors = ['#FF4D8D','#FF7A1A','#FFD600','#00C9A7','#3B82F6','#8B5CF6'];
let colorIdx = 0;
hoverEls.forEach(el => {
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    const c = colors[colorIdx++ % colors.length];
    cur.style.width = '22px'; cur.style.height = '22px';
    cur.style.background = c;
    trail.style.borderColor = c;
    trail.style.width = '54px'; trail.style.height = '54px';
  });
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    cur.style.width = '14px'; cur.style.height = '14px';
    cur.style.background = '#FF4D8D';
    trail.style.borderColor = '#FF4D8D';
    trail.style.width = '36px'; trail.style.height = '36px';
  });
});

// SCROLL FADE IN
const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('visible'); io.unobserve(e.target); }});
}, {threshold:0.1, rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

// PROGRESS BARS on scroll
const barObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      e.target.querySelectorAll('.progress-fill').forEach(b => b.style.width = b.dataset.width);
      barObs.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
}, {threshold: 0.3});
document.querySelectorAll('#thit').forEach(el => barObs.observe(el));

// HERO PHOTO TILT
const photoWrap = document.querySelector('.hero-photo-wrap');
const photoFrame = document.querySelector('.photo-frame');
if(photoWrap){
  photoWrap.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    const r = photoWrap.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (e.clientX - r.left - r.width/2) / (r.width/2);
    const y = (e.clientY - r.top - r.height/2) / (r.height/2);
    photoFrame.style.transform = `perspective(1000px) rotateY(${x*10}deg) rotateX(${-y*7}deg) translateZ(10px)`;
    photoFrame.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s ease-out';
  });
  photoWrap.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    photoFrame.style.transform = 'perspective(1000px) rotateY(0) rotateX(0) translateZ(0)';
    photoFrame.style.transition = 'transform 0.6s ease';
  });
}

// MOUSE SPOTLIGHT on project cards
document.querySelectorAll('.project-card').forEach(card => {
  card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    const r = card.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = ((e.clientX - r.left)/r.width)*100;
    const y = ((e.clientY - r.top)/r.height)*100;
    card.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle at ${x}% ${y}%, #fff 0%, #ffffff 60%)`;
  });
  card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { card.style.background = ''; });
});

// COUNTER ANIMATION for stat chips
function animateCounter(el, target, suffix='') {
  const num = parseFloat(target.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));
  const isK = target.includes('K');
  const isM = target.includes('M');
  const isPlus = target.includes('+');
  const isPct = target.includes('%');
  let start = 0; const dur = 1800;
  const step = ts => {
    if(!start) start = ts;
    const prog = Math.min((ts-start)/dur, 1);
    const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1-prog, 3);
    let cur = (num * ease);
    let disp = isM ? (cur/1).toFixed(2).replace('.00','') : cur.toFixed(isK?0:1).replace('.0','');
    el.textContent = disp + (isM?'M':'') + (isK?'K':'') + (isPlus?'+':'') + (isPct?'%':'');
    if(prog < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    else el.textContent = target;
  };
  requestAnimationFrame(step);
}

const statObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      e.target.querySelectorAll('.stat-num,.metric-num,.rep-stat-num').forEach(el => {
        const
